509:     #[test]
510:     fn stack_ancestors_orders_trunk_closest_first_and_builds_urls() {
511:         let mut state = StackState::new("main".to_string());
512:         state.add_branch("feat/a", "main", "aaa", None, None);
513:         state.add_branch("feat/b", "feat/a", "bbb", None, None);
514:         state.add_branch("feat/c", "feat/b", "ccc", None, None);
515:         state.get_branch_mut("feat/a").expect("a").pr_number = Some(10);
516:         state.get_branch_mut("feat/b").expect("b").pr_number = Some(20);
517: 
518:         let ancestors = stack_ancestors(&state, "feat/c", "org/repo");
519:         assert_eq!(ancestors.len(), 2);
520:         assert_eq!(ancestors[0].branch, "feat/a");
521:         assert_eq!(ancestors[1].branch, "feat/b");
522:         assert_eq!(
523:             ancestors[0].pr_url.as_deref(),
524:             Some("https://github.com/org/repo/pull/10")
525:         );
526:         assert_eq!(
527:             ancestors[1].pr_url.as_deref(),
528:             Some("https://github.com/org/repo/pull/20")
529:         );
530:     }

553:     #[test]
554:     fn draft_resolution_no_draft_flag_wins() {
555:         // --no-draft should override both --draft and config
556:         let no_draft = true;
557:         let draft = true;
558:         let config_draft = Some(true);
559: 
560:         let effective = if no_draft {
561:             false
562:         } else if draft {
563:             true
564:         } else {
565:             config_draft.unwrap_or(false)
566:         };
567:         assert!(!effective, "--no-draft should override everything");
568:     }

645:     #[test]
646:     fn repo_override_replaces_stored_and_config() {
647:         // CLI --repo flag > stored pr_repo > config repo
648:         let mut state = StackState::new("main".to_string());
649:         state.repo = Some("config/repo".to_string());
650:         state.add_branch("feat/a", "main", "aaa", None, None);
651:         state.get_branch_mut("feat/a").unwrap().pr_repo = Some("stored/repo".to_string());
652: 
653:         let repo_override: Option<&str> = Some("cli/override");
654:         let effective = repo_override
655:             .map(|s| s.to_string())
656:             .or_else(|| state.effective_pr_repo("feat/a"));
657:         assert_eq!(effective.as_deref(), Some("cli/override"));
658:     }

762:     #[test]
763:     fn pr_repo_not_overwritten_on_update() {
764:         // When a PR already exists, pr_repo should stay unchanged
765:         let mut state = StackState::new("main".to_string());
766:         state.add_branch("feat/a", "main", "aaa", None, None);
767:         state.get_branch_mut("feat/a").unwrap().pr_number = Some(42);
768:         state.get_branch_mut("feat/a").unwrap().pr_repo = Some("original/repo".to_string());
769: 
770:         // push_or_update_pr only sets pr_repo in the None (new PR) branch
771:         // Existing PR path just updates pr_number, doesn't touch pr_repo
772:         assert_eq!(state.get_branch("feat/a").unwrap().pr_repo.as_deref(), Some("original/repo"));
